message:
feat(animation): add preset animation library (bd-1i67.5)

Add composable animation presets built from core primitives:
- cascade_in/cascade_out: staggered top-to-bottom fade with configurable mode
- fan_out: spread from center outward with ease-out distribution
- typewriter: character-by-character reveal with visible_chars() query
- pulse_sequence: sequential attention pulses (sine half-cycle)
- slide_in_left/slide_in_right: directional slide entry
- fade_through: fade-out-then-in crossfade sequence
- InvertedFade: 1.0→0.0 fade helper (re-exported from animation mod)

30 unit tests covering happy path, edge cases, and determinism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
